title: Teaching endorsements, certificates, or degrees: Which path is right for you?
summary_en: Check out some of the top options for professional development for teachers from UNI if you're interested in advancing your career!
title_cn: 教学背书、证书与硕士学位：教师职业发展路径的选择指南

title: Accelerated BSN at University of Northern Iowa now enrolling for fall launch
summary_en: The University of Northern Iowa is now enrolling students for its new Accelerated Bachelor of Science in Nursing (ABSN) program, set to launch in August 2026.
title_cn: 北爱荷华大学加速护理学理学学士项目招生启动 计划2026年秋季开课

title: Meet the spring 2026 graduating class
summary_en: Keep reading to meet a few members of spring 2026 graduation class and make sure you tell them “congrats!” if you see them in person!
title_cn: 2026年春季毕业生即将步入社会
summary_cn: 北爱荷华大学数百名“黑豹”学子即将毕业，于2026年春季完成学业并踏上职业生涯新阶段或继续攻读高级学位。校方正式介绍

title: Anne Lefter named executive director of the Gallagher Bluedorn Performing Arts Center
summary_en: The University of Northern Iowa is pleased to welcome Anne Lefter as the new executive director of the Gallagher Bluedorn Performing Arts Center.
title_cn: 安妮·莱夫特被任命为加拉格尔·布卢多恩表演艺术中心执行主任
summary_cn: 北爱荷华大学正式宣布，任命安妮·莱夫特为加拉格尔·布卢多恩表演艺术中心新任执行主任。莱夫特在表演艺术行政管理、场馆运营及社区参与项目方面拥有超过二十年的领导经验。她目前担任西伊利诺伊大学戈尔法伯表演艺术中心首任主任，曾负责该中心一座占地10万平方英尺、耗资1.19亿美元新设施的总体规划、运营启动及艺术愿景制定。此前，她在巴尔的摩县社区学院担任艺术主任长达22年，为该校三个校区的多个表演艺术场馆提供行政领导。

title: UNI Division of Graduate Studies Hosts Annual Event Celebrating Excellence
summary_en: The University of Northern Iowa’s Division of Graduate Studies honored outstanding graduate  students, faculty and staff during the annual graduate faculty meeting, an event recognizing individuals whose leadership, service and achievements have made a significant impact on the UNI graduate education community.
title_cn: 北爱荷华大学研究生院举办年度盛典表彰卓越表现

title: UNI study highlights $11+ million in financial benefit from student teaching in Iowa’s rural communities
summary_en: A University of Northern Iowa study quantifies the significant financial benefit of student teachers placed in classrooms across rural communities throughout the state.
title_cn: 北爱荷华大学研究显示学生教师在州内农村社区实习带来逾1100万美元经济效益
summary_cn: 北爱荷华大学一项研究量化了该校学生教师在爱荷华州内各农村社区课堂实习所创造的经济效益。研究得出，自2020年秋季至2024年秋季的四年间，该校学生教师贡献的经济效益估值约为1176万美元。该研究由北爱荷华大学教育学院主导，旨在更深入理解并展示学生教师对全州教育系统的实际贡献。
